finding: Abandoned close did not open a close-commit-window, so follow-up governance commit could require emergency/no-verify paths even after close mutation succeeded.
expectedBehavior: Abandoned close should open a short-lived commit window covering the ledger/event artifacts that exist.
evidenceOrRepro: `TASK-APO-0029` abandoned cleanup required native `git commit --no-verify` after the ATM wrapper rejected the commit due to missing active work session.
followUp: Add validation that abandoned close can be committed through the ATM git wrapper without a fresh claim.
